## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (or workflow `e2e`)
- [ ] `npm run perf:lighthouse` (or CI report reviewed)
- [ ] `npm run security:scan`

## Release readiness
- [ ] Staging deploy verified (`https://staging.ivo-tech.com`)
- [ ] Smoke test passed (hero, modal, language switch, contact, configurator)
- [ ] Rollback path documented if risky
